codeReview.summary: Pass. The fix feature resolved the CI/browser startup mismatch by relying on the already-committed canonical browser stack: `playwright.config.ts` starts `pnpm dev:smoke` on `http://127.0.0.1:3001`, reuses an existing server only outside CI, and `.github/workflows/validation.yml` enforces the browser gate through `pnpm test:browser`. The worker correctly verified the current tree and feature transcript; no blocking or non-blocking issues were found for this feature.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, current config/workflow files, and related commit history. Result: pass — CI now uses the canonical Playwright/browser smoke path on 127.0.0.1:3001 and the browser gate is genuinely enforced via `pnpm test:browser`.
